resources.string:
💙 You are a healthy weight for your height according to your BMI. 

Aim to stay within the healthy weight range by enjoying a heart-healthy eating pattern and being physically active. Most adults should get at least 30 minutes of moderate intensity physical activity on most, if not all, days. 

If you are aged 65 years or over, your general health may be more important than being mildly overweight.

😨 You are underweight for your height. It’s important to aim for a healthy weight range, which is better for your overall health. \n\nYour GP can help, and it’s especially important to speak to them as soon as possible if you are losing weight without trying.

❌ You are overweight for your height. Being overweight can increase your risk of developing heart disease, as well as other health conditions. 

Aim to achieve and maintain a healthy weight by enjoying a heart-healthy eating pattern and being physically active. Most adults should get at least 30 minutes of moderate intensity physical activity on most, if not all, days. Having a healthy weight will help you manage your blood pressure and cholesterol levels. 

If you are aged 65 years or over, your general health may be more important than being mildly overweight.
